is_new.description: Whether this `ip_geo_country` has been seen before for this user.

first_seen_at.description: When this `ip_geo_country` was first seen for this user. Values conform to the RFC 3339 standard and are expressed in UTC, e.g. `2021-12-29T12:33:09Z`.

last_seen_at.description: When this `ip_geo_country` was last seen for this user. Values conform to the RFC 3339 standard and are expressed in UTC, e.g. `2021-12-29T12:33:09Z`.
